kept.text:
フリーランス1年目、私がXに投稿してきたことを振り返ってみた✍️

Shopifyのこと、フリーランスの本音、
子どもとのお出かけ、クライアント様とのエピソード…

「こんなこと投稿していいのかな」って
思っていた等身大の発信が、
思わぬご縁に繋がることがありました🥹

発信に正解はないけど、
「自分らしく続けること」だけが正解だと
今は思っています☺️✨

profile_bio.description: CEO/Co-founder of @nobsroutines and Chief Idiot at @DTHshow

quoted_tweet.text:
imagine selling your shopify brand for $1.2M

wire hits monday. 3 years of work finally paying off

3 months later the buyer texts you

"why is the store down"

while your deal was closing, a competitor in shenzhen filed your trademark. 

uspto approved it last week. 

they started dmca'ing every platform you've ever touched

shopify pulled the store
tiktok deleted the account 
fb ad account shut down 
amazon delisted 
supplier already shipping to the "new owner"

the buyer lost a 7-figure asset

guess who they're suing

you. for breach. because you sold them something you never legally owned

i've watched this kill multiple ecom deals in the last year. beauty, supplements, pet, fashion

if you're doing 30k+/month and haven't filed your trademark, you're not running a brand. you're renting it until someone takes it

https://t.co/lZv8xOk07r. 20 minutes. $350

the brand is the asset. no trademark, no business

kept.text:
5/1
💻WEB制作コース　DAY7

☑︎レスポンシブ対応

文字と文字の間にスペースを空けるか
空けないかで、
コードが反映されないことがあるのを知った😌

カリキュラムの動画と同じように
やってるはずなのに、
なぜー？？と思ってたら、
スペースを１つ空けてたせいで
反映されてなかったみたい👀

コード、めっちゃ繊細やん😂

ＧＷは実家に帰ったりで
いつもとは違う日常なので、
隙間時間を活用しつつ進めていきます💻

#デイトラ #WEB制作コース

To my friends and amazing followers 🤍

Thank you so much for all the birthday wishes, prayers, and gifts. The love was real and I truly appreciate every single one of you.

I’m sorry if I couldn’t reply everyone on time, I missed a lot of messages, but please know I saw them and they meant a lot to me.

I don’t take this love for granted at all. May the kindness you’ve shown me come back to you in bigger ways 🙏🏽

Hey all how are you? Holy shit we actually hit $200,000/month this month throuhg the bullshit I had with META revenue was so fine!

It's rather bittersweet since the person who I love the most who made this happen a bit (through courses we watched) no longer is in my life sadly (breakups? ouch) 
, I love her to the moon and back. Thank you is all I can say and I appreciate you more than you ever know. 

Holds a very special place in my heart.

But yeah we hit a major April this is wild!
